steps.title: Spot the blending clue
steps.content: Identify the single signal that the artists are mixing Indigenous and other musical styles: “incorporated Inuit throat singing into electronic music” and “combined Indigenous flute and powwow vocals with electronic music”. This shows they are blending, not keeping the styles separate.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content: Reject means they do not accept the distinction; they blend the styles, exactly as the examples show. Observe, replace, and disguise either suggest noticing differences, swapping them, or hiding them, none of which match the blending action. That matches choice A - A is correct.
